label: Deduplication, contamination control & provenance

node.label: Deduplication, contamination control & provenance
node.definition: Deduplication and decontamination remove repeated or benchmark-overlapping examples while retaining provenance needed to audit corpus composition.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Deduplication, contamination control & provenance is to connect Data collection, curation & filtering, Embeddings & distributed representations to downstream capabilities including Large language models.
examples: combined with Data collection, curation & filtering
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Data collection, curation & filtering, Embeddings & distributed representations.

dependencies.rationale: Deduplication, contamination control & provenance uses Data collection, curation & filtering as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Deduplication, contamination control & provenance uses Embeddings & distributed representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Deduplication, contamination control & provenance uses Databases & information retrieval as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
